fields.label: Target fieldname (empty for DocType-level property)
fields.rationale: Names an existing DocField on the target DocType. Empty means the Property Setter targets a property of the DocType itself (e.g. title_field, default_print_format, search_fields) rather than any specific field. The controller auto-routes based on emptiness: empty field_name + property='some_doctype_prop' sets a DocType-level override; non-empty sets a DocField-level override.

fields.label: New value
fields.rationale: The override value. MUST match property_type: Check properties take '0' or '1' (string); Data / Text take plain strings; Select takes one of the property's valid option strings; Int takes a numeric string. Mismatches are accepted at save but fail at render time. Empty string is a valid value for clearing a Data / Text property.

fields.label: Scope hint ('DocType' or 'DocField')
fields.rationale: Usually DocField (you're overriding a DocField property like reqd / label / hidden / options / read_only). Set to DocType when overriding a DocType-level property (title_field, search_fields, default_print_format, allow_import) - and leave field_name empty in that case.
